formal_statement: Use the 10 A illite/mica layer model and pseudo-mirror coordinates for the simplified 001 calculation.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

source.quote_fragment: 10 A from the center of the K atom

formal_statement: If intensity is evaluated exactly at the Bragg angle, Phi may be numerically unstable or rounding-sensitive.
